# Powered-OOS Graveyard Re-sweep + MGC Wide Scan — 2026-05-29

**Generated by:** `research/powered_oos_graveyard_resweep.py` + `research/powered_mgc_wide_scan.py`
**Doctrine:** `memory/feedback_powered_oos_holdout_at_discovery_no_calendar_wait_2026_05_29.md`
**Canonical source:** `orb_outcomes JOIN daily_features` (triple-join, `orb_minutes` PINNED — RULE 9)
**Holdout:** trade-fraction (last 30% by `trading_day`, temporal order), power via `research.oos_power`
**Look-ahead gate:** `research.comprehensive_deployed_lane_scan._overnight_lookhead_clean` (RULE 1.2)
**No DB mutation. Read-only. Numbers from a read-only snapshot of the committed gold.db.**

---

## Why this audit exists

Operator directive: *"surely we can re-look at trades again"* — if OOS is held out by
trade-fraction (powered) instead of by calendar date, every edge previously killed for
"thin OOS / wait to accumulate" deserves a powered re-judge. This is the re-judge.

## CRITICAL methodology correction (caught in-session)

The first ad-hoc exploratory queries in this session JOINed `orb_outcomes` to
`daily_features` on `(trading_day, symbol)` only — **missing `d.orb_minutes = o.orb_minutes`**.
`daily_features` has 3 rows per `(trading_day, symbol)` (one per aperture), so the
defective join **inflated N by 3× and t by ~√3 = 1.73×** (RULE 9). Direct reproduction:

| Cell | N (defective join) | N (canonical triple-join) |
|---|---|---|
| MES LONDON_METALS O30 RR1.5 long ovn≥80 | 603 | **201** |

Every number in this report uses the canonical triple-join. The earlier
exploratory figures (e.g. "H1 t=4.59", "H2 OOS t=4.78") are **RETRACTED** as
3×-inflated artefacts.

---

## TASK 1 — Graveyard re-sweep (7 candidates)

All from the 2026-04-15 T0-T8 horizon postmortems (`06_RD_GRAVEYARD.md`).

| Candidate | N | FULL t | IS t | Frac-OOS N | Frac-OOS ExpR | Frac-OOS t | Power | Tier | Verdict |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| H1 MES LONDON_METALS O30 RR1.5 long ovn≥80 | 201 | 2.64 | 2.87 | 61 | +0.073 | 0.48 | 0.46 | USELESS | UNVERIFIED |
| H2 MNQ COMEX_SETTLE O5 RR1.0 long garch≥70 | 218 | 3.84 | 2.76 | 66 | +0.309 | 2.78 | 0.43 | USELESS | UNVERIFIED |
| H2 MNQ COMEX_SETTLE O5 RR1.5 long garch≥70 | 218 | 3.33 | 1.92 | 66 | +0.453 | 3.16 | 0.24 | USELESS | UNVERIFIED |
| H2x MES COMEX_SETTLE O5 RR1.0 long garch≥70 | 218 | 0.54 | -0.34 | 66 | +0.161 | 1.48 | 0.06 | USELESS | UNVERIFIED (no IS edge) |
| H5 MES COMEX_SETTLE O30 RR1.0 long ovn_pdh=0 | 639 | 1.72 | 1.83 | 192 | +0.021 | 0.35 | 0.22 | USELESS | UNVERIFIED |
| H3 MNQ COMEX_SETTLE O5 RR1.0 long Monday | 179 | 2.19 | 1.72 | 54 | +0.165 | 1.34 | 0.20 | USELESS | UNVERIFIED |
| H4 MNQ COMEX_SETTLE O5 RR1.0 long Thursday | 190 | 2.00 | 0.98 | 57 | +0.257 | 2.16 | 0.10 | USELESS | UNVERIFIED |

**Finding:** with the canonical join, **no graveyard candidate reaches even
DIRECTIONAL_ONLY (power ≥ 0.50) on a fraction holdout.** The strongest persistent
signal is **H2 (MNQ COMEX_SETTLE garch≥70)** — IS t=3.84, frac-OOS ExpR +0.31 with
dir_match holding — but power 0.43 leaves it formally UNVERIFIED. It needs ~158 OOS
trades for 80% power vs 66 available. The graveyard kills were correctly cautious;
the powered re-look does NOT rescue any of them to deployable status.

## TASK 2 — MGC wide scan (full RULE 5 grid)

**1,992 cells** tested: all MGC sessions × {5,15,30}min × {1.0,1.5,2.0}RR × {long,short}
× trade-time-knowable feature grid (overnight_range_pct, atr_20_pct, garch_vol_pct,
day_of_week), RULE 1.2 gates applied, canonical triple-join.

**Result: ZERO MGC cells reach DIRECTIONAL_ONLY powered OOS.** Best full-period
t = 2.64 (US_DATA_830 O30 RR2.0 long Tuesday); **none pass BH-FDR at K_family**;
every cell is STATISTICALLY_USELESS on OOS power (max 0.41).

Top promising-but-underpowered cells (positive ExpR + dir_match, by full t):

| session | om | rr | dir | filter | N | FULL t | OOS pw | tier |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| US_DATA_830 | 30 | 2.0 | long | Tuesday | 100 | 2.64 | 0.41 | USELESS |
| NYSE_OPEN | 30 | 2.0 | long | Thursday | 103 | 2.56 | 0.15 | USELESS |
| SINGAPORE_OPEN | 30 | 2.0 | long | Friday | 98 | 2.40 | 0.17 | USELESS |
| EUROPE_FLOW | 30 | 2.0 | long | atr_20_pct≥60 | 296 | 2.27 | 0.41 | USELESS |
| LONDON_METALS | 30 | 1.5 | long | ovn≥80 | 124 | 2.12 | 0.23 | USELESS |

**Root cause:** MGC real-micro horizon is ~1001 trading days (3.0yr, from 2022-06-13).
Any conditional cuts N to ~100-300, OOS to ~30-90 — below the power floor for any
detectable effect size. This is a **data-quantity wall, not an edge verdict.**

---

## Verdicts

- **MES:** no powered standalone lane. Cross-asset garch transfer (H2x) has no IS edge.
- **MGC:** the best *structural* diversifier (gold vs Nasdaq book), but **canonically
  un-judgeable today** — `UNVERIFIED_INSUFFICIENT_POWER` across the entire grid. NOT dead;
  data-starved. Per doctrine: park, do not "wait" as a deployment gate.
- **MNQ H2 (garch≥70 COMEX_SETTLE):** strongest survivor of the whole sweep, IS-real,
  OOS-positive with dir_match — but power 0.43, formally UNVERIFIED. Also same-session
  as a live COMEX_SETTLE lane → correlation gate would apply even if powered.

## Literature-grounded path forward (NOT a wait)

For MGC specifically, the only literature-clean way to ACT before confirmatory power
exists is **signal-only shadow under the Shiryaev-Roberts monitor** (Criterion 12;
`pepelyshev_polunchenko_2015_cusum_sr.md`, extracted from
`resources/real_time_strategy_monitoring_cusum.pdf`) — SR is multi-cyclic-optimal for
detection delay, so a decayed edge is cut fast rather than bled. This bounds downside
without claiming validity. Zero capital. Requires a pre-reg with SR thresholds (A, h,
ARL) pre-committed (RULE 10).

## Limitations

- Trade-fraction OOS preserves temporal order but is a single split; CPCV (AFML Ch 12)
  would give multi-path OOS and is the stronger tool for short-horizon data — not run here.
- Snapshot-bound: a future `orb_outcomes` rebuild could shift individual t-stats.
- This is single-instrument discovery, not a pooled claim; each cell reported individually.
- BH-FDR computed at K_family (the MGC grid). A broader K_global across instruments would
  only make the gate stricter, not looser.

## Reproduction

```bash
python research/powered_oos_graveyard_resweep.py        # graveyard re-judge
python research/powered_mgc_wide_scan.py --csv <out.csv> # MGC full grid
```
Full MGC grid CSV: `docs/audit/results/2026-05-29-powered-mgc-wide-scan.csv`.
